scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @eskerra/mobile && npm run lint -w @eskerra/desktop && npm run check:architecture
scripts.test:phase1: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -s all -c auto -n lint,meta,core,tokens,dsd,desk,dsm,mob "npm run lint" "npm run validate-metainfo -w @eskerra/desktop" "npm run test -w @eskerra/core" "npm run test -w @eskerra/tokens && npm run check:generated -w @eskerra/tokens" "npm run test -w @eskerra/ds-desktop" "npm run test -w @eskerra/desktop" "npm run test -w @eskerra/ds-mobile" "npm run test -w @eskerra/mobile"
scripts.test:phase2: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -s all -c auto -n sbDesk,sbMob "npm run build-storybook -w @eskerra/ds-desktop" "npm run build-storybook-web -w @eskerra/ds-mobile"
scripts.test:phase3: node --test scripts/bump-release-version-lib.test.mjs && node --test scripts/sync-app-version-artifacts-lib.test.mjs && node --test scripts/tauri-desktop-build.test.mjs && node --test scripts/update-module-budget-baseline.test.mjs && node scripts/assert-app-versions-align.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test:phase1 && npm run test:phase2 && npm run test:phase3
